title: VS Code Marketplace Extension Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for the VS Code Marketplace Gallery API extension response.

extensionQueryResponse.description: Top-level response from the extensionquery endpoint.

results.description: Array of result sets (one per filter).

resultMetadata.description: Metadata about result counts per category, tag, or facet.

extension.description: A single VS Code extension from the Marketplace.

extensionName.description: Short name used in extension IDs (publisher.name).

publisher.description: Publisher metadata including name and verification status.

versions.description: Available versions with asset URIs and file listings.

statistics.description: Install count, rating, and trending statistics.

extensionQueryRequest.description: Request body for the extensionquery POST endpoint.

filters.description: Filter criteria applied to the query.

criteria.description: Criteria objects each with filterType (int) and value (string). FilterType: 1=Tag, 4=ExtensionId, 5=Category, 7=ExtensionName, 8=Target, 10=FullText, 12=ExcludeWithFlags.

flags.description: Bitmask controlling response detail. 16863=AllAttributes. Common values: 7 (minimal), 914 (standard), 16863 (all).
